update.clogs:

Beta Update

Added: InstaPrime Options icon in Stories.

Added: Option to Hide 'InstaPrime Options' icon from stories.

Added: Option to Hide 'Mark as Seen' icon from stories.

Added: Long Press for InstaPrime Options (Beta) - Simply long press on any story to quickly access InstaPrime options menu.

Added: Option to Enable / Disable Long Press for InstaPrime Options in Post / Stories.

Fixed: Enhance Photo Quality Crashes.

Fixed: Repost Crashes.

Fixed: Reels Crashes.

Fixed: DMs Crashes.
